description: Your boss just asked you to stay late to finish a critical report, but it's your Mom's 60th birthday dinner tonight.
You have a massive headache and feel a fever coming on, but a project proposal is due in 4 hours that could secure your promotion.
Your best friends are going on a spontaneous weekend trip that costs $500, but you're $200 short of your monthly savings goal.
An angry client is calling you after hours demanding a fix, just as you're sitting down for a rare romantic dinner with your partner.
